name: Alligator Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Hot sausage (Italian) - cut into chunks
2 cups Chicken stock (made with 2 chicken cube packs and water)
Cajun spices (blackened or Cajun king herb blend) to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a deep frying pan (preferably cast iron), sauté the bell peppers, garlic, parsley, and celery.
2. While the vegetables are cooking, combine tomatoes, their liquid, chicken stock, green onion in a pot that can cook on the stove and in the oven (Corningware).
3. Stir in spices, sauteed vegetables, raw rice, sausage, and alligator fillet pieces.
4. Cook over medium-high heat until the liquid is absorbed and stirring occasionally to prevent the rice from burning at the bottom.
5. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake covered in the oven for 25 minutes.
